name: Flourless Monster Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together well the sugars and softened butter.
2. Add eggs and peanut butter to the mixture.
3. Combine the quick oatmeal and baking soda mix thoroughly.
4. Add vanilla and maple syrup, mixing well again.
5. Fold in the chocolate chips and M&M's.
6. Spoon batter onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 12 minutes per pan. Do not over bake.
8. Because the cookies contain no flour, they are very moist and shouldn't be completely cooled on a rack (or they will break).
